message:
fix(fr-command): gate SENTINEL dispatch on sentinel_mode flag (br-frankenredis-pq3z)

Surfaced by /reality-check-for-project: README's documented validation
command `cargo test --workspace` was failing on the
`conformance_core_module_sentinel` fixture because the SENTINEL command
dispatch was always-on. Upstream's `server.sentinel_mode` flag governs
whether SENTINEL is registered as a command; vanilla `redis-server`
returns "ERR unknown command 'SENTINEL', with args beginning with: ..."
because the command isn't registered at all when not in sentinel mode.

* Add `Store::sentinel_mode: bool` (default false), mirroring upstream
  `server.sentinel_mode`.
* Gate the `Some(CommandId::Sentinel)` arm in `dispatch_argv` on
  `store.sentinel_mode`. When the flag is unset, fall through to the
  unknown-command path so the reply matches upstream's exact error
  format byte-for-byte.
* Update the 6 existing fr-command sentinel tests to flip the flag
  before dispatch (otherwise they'd see the new "unknown command"
  reply instead of exercising the sentinel handlers).
* New gate test `sentinel_command_unknown_unless_sentinel_mode_set`
  pins the contract: SENTINEL → UnknownCommand error when
  `sentinel_mode == false`, real dispatch when `sentinel_mode == true`.

Validated via rch: cargo test -p fr-command 7 sentinel tests green;
cargo test -p fr-conformance --lib conformance_core_module_sentinel
green; cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings clean.
README's `cargo test --workspace` claim now holds (only the prior
unrelated `memory_stats_returns_bulk` test still fails on main, which
is tracked separately).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1297,6 +1297,15 @@ pub struct Store {
     pub command_histograms: CommandHistogramTracker,
     /// Store-owned Sentinel state used by SENTINEL subcommands.
     pub sentinel_state: fr_sentinel::SentinelState,
+    /// True when the server was started in sentinel mode (`redis-server
+    /// --sentinel` upstream). Off by default — the SENTINEL command is
+    /// only registered when this flag is set, matching upstream's
+    /// `server.sentinel_mode` gate. Without this gate, a vanilla
+    /// frankenredis instance would expose SENTINEL responses where
+    /// upstream returns "ERR unknown command 'SENTINEL'", which trips
+    /// the core_module_sentinel conformance fixture.
+    /// (br-frankenredis-pq3z)
+    pub sentinel_mode: bool,
     /// Server hz (event loop frequency), synced from runtime.
     pub server_hz: u64,
     /// Replication backlog size, synced from runtime.
@@ -1474,6 +1483,7 @@ impl Default for Store {
             latency_tracker: LatencyTracker::default(),
             command_histograms: CommandHistogramTracker::default(),
             sentinel_state: fr_sentinel::SentinelState::new(),
+            sentinel_mode: false,
             server_hz: 10,
             server_repl_backlog_size: 1_048_576,
             server_maxclients: 10000,
